triggers.name: Enemy timer: Bellow
triggers.comments: ~1m00s at level 50 (formula 3, cap 10 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Warrior level 52. v1 keys enemy timers by spell name only — two mobs under the same spell share one bar.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Berate
triggers.comments: ~1m00s at level 50 (formula 3, cap 10 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Warrior level 56. v1 keys enemy timers by spell name only — two mobs under the same spell share one bar.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Provoke
triggers.comments: ~1m00s at level 50 (formula 3, cap 10 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Warrior level 20. v1 keys enemy timers by spell name only — two mobs under the same spell share one bar.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Bellow
triggers.pattern: ^Your Bellow spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.
